title: Repair StackOverflow lane so current-review-window packets do not suppress fresh candidate discovery

why_this_action.summary: The latest StackOverflow lane was still stopping on the already-delivered Claude Code packet, which hid later high-intent searches and made the hold window look emptier than it really was.
shared_findings_used: marketing_execution_board_latest.md: current StackOverflow packet was already delivered in this review window
marketing_2026-05-28_stackoverflow_manual_delivery.json: identifies the exact delivered question URL
stackoverflow_answer_lane_latest.json: latest lane only surfaced the already-delivered question
marketing_workflow_audit_latest.json: hold window should improve future demand-capture odds instead of regenerating the same packet

result.summary: Added a review-window guard that retires the manually delivered StackOverflow question for the current window and removed the early-stop path that treated recent drafts as enough reason to halt discovery.
result.business_effect: Future post-hold reruns will not waste the StackOverflow slot rediscovering the same already-delivered packet before checking later high-intent searches.
blocking_factors: The full rerun still found no fresh StackOverflow candidates after excluding the already-delivered question, so the lane truthfully remains empty for this window.
